conditions.notes: Agency may require medical release or certification confirming ability to perform essential functions upon return from illness or injury.
conditions.source_text: Each agency may, as a condition of return, require an employee who is absent from work because of illness or injury to supply an appropriate medical release or certification that the employee is able to return to work.

conditions.notes: Fitness-for-duty certification may be required only if the agency reasonably believes return could pose significant risk of harm, and may be required no more often than every 30 calendar days.
conditions.source_text: An agency may require fitness-for-duty certification only if the agency reasonably believes the return could pose significant risk of harm to the employee or others. Such certification may be required no more often than every 30 calendar days.

conditions.notes: Agency may require supporting evidence if the employee uses 17 or more hours of sick leave in a 30 calendar day period or has demonstrated excessive or abusive use of sick leave.
conditions.source_text: An employee may be required to furnish evidence to support the use of sick leave if the employee uses 17 or more hours of sick leave in a 30 calendar day period or has demonstrated excessive or abusive use of sick leave.

conditions.notes: Satisfactory written evidence is required to charge illness during annual leave to sick leave.
conditions.source_text: If an employee is ill for three (3) workdays or more during a period of annual leave, the period of illness may be charged to sick leave if the employee provides satisfactory written evidence supporting the illness during annual leave.

conditions.notes: Employee must apply in writing and include supporting documentation to obtain restoration of divested sick leave.
conditions.source_text: To obtain restoration of divested sick leave, an employee must apply in writing to the employing agency and include supporting documentation.

conditions.notes: Agencies may require supporting documentation for paid parental leave. Required documentation must be the same as that required for federal FMLA for the same qualifying event.
conditions.source_text: Agencies may require employees to submit appropriate supporting documentation for the use of paid parental leave. Any required supporting documentation shall be the same as that required for the use of federal family and medical leave under Section (7) of Rule 478-1-.23, Family and Medical Leave, for the same qualifying event.
